name: a5-engine-imap-spike
description: ROADMAP A5 spike — validate the EmailPort send/reply/bounce/thread/unsub contract against a real local SMTP+IMAP server (GreenMail) before the VendorPort freeze. Isolated from the root workspace on purpose (spikes/ is not in the workspace globs), so it never touches the root lockfile or the 130/130 suite.
